label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's look at the question and the text. The question is asking what the police mainly wanted people to do based on the article. The article says that Sri Lankan police made an appeal for the public to donate their pet dogs to help fight terrorism and crime. They want dogs of certain breeds and within a certain age range. They mention that they are asking for donations because they need more police dogs and are under pressure in their kennels. They need about 50 dogs and will train them. The options are: A) Offer their dogs to be Police Dogs. B) Stop their dogs from biting people. C) Take care not to lose their dogs. D) Give their dogs good training. The main point of the police appeal is to get more dogs
